name: Helga

conquest.name: Antler Assault
conquest.description: Helga performs an antler charge, dealing area of effect damage, knocking the targets back, and stunning them for 1 second.

conquest.name: Spear Charge
conquest.description: Helga deals damage to the target.

conquest.name: Fury
conquest.description: When taking damage, Helga has a 10% chance of increasing Attack for 3 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

expedition.name: Oath of Guardian
expedition.description: Chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

expedition.name: Echoes of Valhalla
expedition.description: Helga blows a horn to motivate the squad, increasing the Attack of all squads.

expedition.name: Nature's Balance
expedition.description: Helga invites everyone to embrace nature, increasing the Lethality of all squads.

talent.name: Power of the Deer
talent.description: Helga's unique talent bolsters the Attack and Defense of all deployed soldiers, even in her absence.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Valiant Fury
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Fueled by fury, Helga increases damage dealt. Unlocked only when Bands of Tyre is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Zeal
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Helga joins the rally, increasing the Lethality of rallied troops. Unlocked only when Bands of Tyre is equipped.

exclusive_gear.name: Bands of Tyre
exclusive_gear.notes: Exclusive to Helga. Perplexity/allclash called it 'Helga's Lance' — likely source confusion or a different piece. 2 primary sources (kingshot-data, kingshotwiki) confirm 'Bands of Tyre' as canonical.

order: Max Antler Assault first (AOE stun for battlefield control)
Spear Charge and Fury next (Conquest damage kit)
Expedition skills (Oath of Guardian, Echoes of Valhalla, Nature's Balance) for squad buffs
Power of the Deer passive (low-priority since it's always active)
Exclusive Gear skills (Valiant Fury, Zeal) after equipping Bands of Tyre
skill_priority.reasoning: Inferred from general pattern; no explicit upgrade-order source for Helga.

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard Infantry archetype. Her exclusive gear Bands of Tyre adds +55.50% Infantry Lethality and +55.50% Infantry Health, stacking with the regular gear priorities (Lethality on Helmet/Boots, Health on Gloves/Chest).

best_partners.named_pairs_reasoning: No source provides explicit 'Helga + X because Y' pair recommendations.

lineup_inferences.note: Helga works as an early rally alternative to Amadeus. Her squad-wide Attack and Lethality buffs (Echoes of Valhalla, Nature's Balance) plus her Fury self-Attack stacking suggest pairing with joiners that benefit from extended fights.
lineup_inferences.source: inference from heroes.js tags + skill kit

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Helga is commonly framed as an 'Amadeus alternative' — same offensive-infantry role, different acquisition path (she's behind VIP packs, he's behind higher-VIP packs). Falls off in later generations as stronger rally leads become available. Not typically paired with another rally lead; she IS the lead when used.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: Helga is VIP-gated. Multiple sources confirm she is unlocked exclusively through purchase packages and VIP-level gifts. kingshot-data explicitly states 'You can unlock Helga by purchasing VIP Level special gift packages.' Lower VIP tier than Amadeus (VIP 1-6 vs Amadeus VIP 7+), so she's accessible to more spenders — but not to F2P players.

rally.reasoning: Strong early rally alternative, positioned as an Amadeus alt for players who have VIP 1-6 access but not VIP 7+. Her Conquest AOE (Antler Assault with knockback + stun), plus squad-wide buffs from Expedition skills make her a legitimate rally lead for early and mid game. Falls off relative to Gen 5-6 rally leads.

garrison.reasoning: Workable for defense but her kit emphasizes offensive pressure rather than sustained defense.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Adequate bear hunt contributor via her squad-wide damage buffs. Not a top pick.

joiner.reasoning: Not typically used as a joiner. Her value is as a rally leader.

lore_background.title: The Defiant Viking
lore_background.backstory: A Viking warrior from the northlands with a tragic backstory. Born into a Viking tribe where her parents were respected warriors, Helga learned to ride a moose as a young girl. But her defining trait was a refusal to accept the warlike ways of her ancestors. She challenged tribal tradition in a public confrontation with the warchief, was forced into a death duel, and defeated the warchief's champion. She was allowed to leave on mooseback. After her departure, the warchief began a great cleansing of the tribe, eventually becoming Viking King. That one act of resistance from Helga still burns in the Viking King's heart.
lore_background.personality_trait: principled, defiant, pacifist-warrior, exile forged by conviction
lore_background.note: All lore elements from kingshotwiki. Title 'The Defiant Viking' synthesized from the defining trait of refusing tribal tradition.

deep_analysis: Helga is the reluctant Viking warrior — a Legendary Infantry hero framed by community guides as the 'Amadeus alternative' for spenders at VIP 1-6 who don't yet have access to Amadeus's VIP 7+ gate. Her Conquest kit is built around AOE disruption: Antler Assault deals up to Attack × 224% area damage with knockback and a 1-second stun, Spear Charge adds Attack × 210% single-target follow-up, and Fury grants a 10% chance per damage taken to stack up to +60% Attack across 5 stacks — turning her into a rage counter-puncher the longer a fight drags on. Her Expedition tree provides squad support: Oath of Guardian has up to a 40% chance to halve incoming squad damage, Echoes of Valhalla grants all squads +25% Attack, and Nature's Balance adds another +25% Lethality. Her Talent Power of the Deer passively boosts all deployed soldiers by up to +10% Attack and Defense — an always-on foundation. Her exclusive gear Bands of Tyre adds +55.50% Infantry Lethality and +55.50% Infantry Health on top of +379 Attack, +495 Defense, +7425 Health base stats, and unlocks two more skills: Valiant Fury (+30% self damage dealt) and Zeal (+15% Rally Troops Lethality). Community tier lists place her at A-tier Rally, B-tier Garrison and Bear Hunt — she's a strong early-to-mid rally alternative, but falls off against Gen 5-6 rally leads. She's behind VIP 1-6 gift packages, which makes her accessible to most spenders but not to F2P players. Her lore is among the richest in Gen 1: a Viking princess who refused her tribe's warrior culture, dueled the warchief's champion, and rode into exile on mooseback — her defiance still burning in the Viking King's heart.
unverified_fields: skill_priority.order — inferred only, no explicit source for Helga specifically
gear_recommendations.optimum_build level 60 for Helmet and Boots — single source (allclash via Perplexity)
'Helga's Lance' discrepancy — Perplexity/allclash used this name, 2 primary sources say 'Bands of Tyre'. Possibly a secondary piece OR source confusion. Using Bands of Tyre as canonical.
